Annotation

Conclusion and Recommendations based on this report and previous findings known to us
The patient shows significant hyperglycemia, elevated creatinine suggesting impaired renal function, and dyslipidemia with high LDL and triglycerides. Globulin is markedly low, which may indicate a calculation or unit error (g/L vs. g/dL) or hypogammaglobulinemia. Other parameters are within normal limits. Recommend further evaluation for diabetes, renal dysfunction, and clarification of globulin result.
